label: HPP offspring × variant × haplotype assignment
description: SPEC_HPP.md Table A. One row per (offspring, variant, hap_copy). hap_copy ∈ {hap_from_P1, hap_from_P2, unassigned}; allele_state ∈ {ref, alt, unknown}; projection_source ∈ {parent_homozygous, parent_heterozygous_phased, parent_heterozygous_unphased}; segment_confidence ∈ {Gold, Silver, Bronze}; composite confidence per SPEC §5.

label: HPP per-(offspring, gene, segment) status
description: SPEC_HPP.md Table B. predicted_gene_status ∈ {reference_like, het_masked, hom_exposed_same_variant, compound_het_trans, compound_het_cis, partially_resolved, unresolved}. Headline HPP product for manuscript supplementary; same enum as KBC per-gene status but with per-individual exactness up to inheritance-map confidence.

label: HPP per-(dyad or triad) transmission summary
description: SPEC_HPP.md Tables C and D unified. Per-relationship variant-transmission counts, gene-status counts, Mendelian-consistency status, n_de_novo_candidates (triad-only). No family-hub aggregation.

label: HPP × KBC arrangement-assignment cross-check
description: SPEC_HPP.md Table E. Per (variant, offspring, inversion) concordance between HPP haplotype assignment and KBC karyotype-derived arrangement-background assignment. Discordances at inversion edges / Bronze segments are diagnostic, not failures.
